purpose: add_fact_from_csv's malformed arms: missing file ('CSV file not found: <path>'); an invalid static cell ("Row 1: Failed to parse fact - Row 1: Invalid static value 'maybe'" — doubled prefix); a missing fact_text cell (same doubled shape); and a zero-byte file, which warns and returns without raising (pandas' EmptyDataError swallowed at pyreason.py:1334-1337) — the no-raise outcome record is the compared observation for the bound-empty-file class (the warning lands on stderr, uncompared; no fact accessor exists to observe the empty state).
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_fact_from_csv malformed-missing-file/malformed-bad-static/malformed-missing-fact_text/bound-empty-file; pyreason.py:1326-1412 at the pin; exception text screened live 2026-07-07
